# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: "security.istio.io/v1beta1"
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-authn-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myapp
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "test@foo.bar" # change with actual JWT Issuer
    jwksUri: "https://www.googleapis.com/robot/v1/metadata/x509/securetoken@system.gserviceaccount.com" # replace this URL with your own well-known jwks endpoint
